name: Pipedrive
description: Create and edit data in Pipedrive

fields.label: Subject
fields.description: The subject of the activity to create

fields.label: Done
fields.description: Whether the activity is done or not

fields.label: Type
fields.description: Type of the activity like "call", "meeting", etc

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: deal_id, due_date, note, org_id, person_id, user_id, customFields)

fields.label: Use Raw Field Keys
fields.description: Whether to provide raw Pipedrive field keys and option IDs instead of human-readable names

fields.label: Activity ID
fields.description: ID of the activity to delete

fields.label: Activity ID
fields.description: ID of the activity to get

fields.label: Show Raw Field Keys
fields.description: Whether to show raw Pipedrive field keys and option IDs instead of human-readable names in output

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Show Raw Field Keys
fields.description: Whether to show raw Pipedrive field keys and option IDs instead of human-readable names in output

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: dealId, done, end_date, filterId, start_date, type, user_id)

fields.label: Activity ID
fields.description: ID of the activity to update

fields.label: Update Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: busy_flag, deal_id, done, due_date, note, org_id, person_id, public_description, subject, type, user_id, customFields)

fields.description: Whether to provide raw Pipedrive field keys and option IDs instead of human-readable names

fields.label: Title

fields.label: Organization ID

endpoints.label: Add Deal Product

fields.label: Deal ID
fields.description: ID of the deal to add a product to

fields.label: Product ID
fields.description: ID of the product to add to the deal

fields.label: Item Price
fields.description: Price at which to add this product to the deal

fields.label: Quantity
fields.description: How many items of this product to add to the deal

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: comments, discount, discount_type, tax)

endpoints.description: Add a product to a deal

endpoints.label: Get Many Deal Product

fields.label: Deal ID
fields.description: ID of the deal whose products to retrieve

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

endpoints.description: Get many products of a deal

endpoints.label: Remove Deal Product

fields.label: Deal ID
fields.description: ID of the deal whose product to remove

fields.label: Product Attachment ID
fields.description: ID of the deal-product (the ID of the product attached to the deal, not the product ID itself)

endpoints.description: Remove a product from a deal

endpoints.label: Update Deal Product

fields.label: Deal ID
fields.description: ID of the deal whose product to update

fields.description: ID of the deal-product (the ID of the product attached to the deal, not the product ID itself)

fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: comments, discount, discount_type, item_price, quantity, tax)
